texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Madaraka Express Package
texts.text: Madaraka Express Package

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Take a ride to the Heart of T savo
texts.text: Take a ride to the Heart of T savo

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Special Offer Details:
texts.text: Special Offer Details:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: The package is based on a 2-night stay.
texts.text: The package is based on a 2-night stay.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Accommodation on a Full Board basis.
texts.text: Accommodation on a Full Board basis.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Includes return Inter-County Train Tickets for seamless travel.
texts.text: Includes return Inter-County Train Tickets for seamless travel.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Includes return transfers from Voi Train Station to the lodge/resort.
texts.text: Includes return transfers from Voi Train Station to the lodge/resort.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Package includes 2 game drives per stay within the Taita Hills Wildlife Sanctuary. Additional game drives will attract a supplementary charge.
texts.text: Package includes 2 game drives per stay within the Taita Hills Wildlife Sanctuary. Additional game drives will attract a supplementary charge.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Package includes E.A Residents/Citizens Sanctuary Entry Fees.
texts.text: Package includes E.A Residents/Citizens Sanctuary Entry Fees.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Enjoy a complimentary Heritage Tour of World War I at The Taita Hills Museum.
texts.text: Enjoy a complimentary Heritage Tour of World War I at The Taita Hills Museum.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Green Season Offer: Book & enjoy extra nights at Kes. 6,000 per person per night for Full Board accommodation only. Valid for stays between 1st April and 30th June 2025! ( Excluding Easter Holidays)
texts.text: Green Season Offer: Book & enjoy extra nights at Kes. 6,000 per person per night for Full Board accommodation only. Valid for stays between 1st April and 30th June 2025! ( Excluding Easter Holidays)

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Terms & Conditions:
texts.text: Terms & Conditions:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Child Policy:
texts.text: Child Policy:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: For safety reasons, children under the age of 5 years are not permitted at Salt Lick Safari Lodge.
texts.text: For safety reasons, children under the age of 5 years are not permitted at Salt Lick Safari Lodge.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Children aged 5-11.99 years sharing with 1 or 2 adults will be charged 50% of the adult sharing (half twin) rate per child.
texts.text: Children aged 5-11.99 years sharing with 1 or 2 adults will be charged 50% of the adult sharing (half twin) rate per child.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Children aged 5-11.99 years in their own room (minimum 2, maximum 3) will be charged 75% of the adult sharing (half twin) rate per child.
texts.text: Children aged 5-11.99 years in their own room (minimum 2, maximum 3) will be charged 75% of the adult sharing (half twin) rate per child.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Children younger than 12 years should ideally share rooms next to parents/adults (subject to availability).
texts.text: Children younger than 12 years should ideally share rooms next to parents/adults (subject to availability).

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: These offers are subject to change without prior notice and are subject to the availability of train tickets.
texts.text: These offers are subject to change without prior notice and are subject to the availability of train tickets.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Reservation will be guaranteed only by full payment.
texts.text: Reservation will be guaranteed only by full payment.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Rates are inclusive of all Government Taxes.
texts.text: Rates are inclusive of all Government Taxes.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Other Terms & Conditions may apply.
texts.text: Other Terms & Conditions may apply.
